2604.08868.title: MedFormer-UR: Uncertainty-Routed Transformer for Medical Image Classification
2604.08868.paper_summary: To ensure safe clinical integration, deep learning models must provide more than just high accuracy; they require dependable uncertainty quantification. While current Medical Vision Transformers perform well, they frequently struggle with overconfident predictions and a lack of transparency, issues that are magnified by the noisy and imbalanced nature of clinical data. To address this, we enhanced the modified Medical Transformer (MedFormer) that incorporates prototype-based learning and uncertainty-guided routing, by utilizing a Dirichlet distribution for per-token evidential uncertainty, our framework can quantify and localize ambiguity in real-time. This uncertainty is not just an output but an active participant in the training process, filtering out unreliable feature updates. Furthermore, the use of class-specific prototypes ensures the embedding space remains structured, allowing for decisions based on visual similarity. Testing across four modalities (mammography, ultrasound, MRI, and histopathology) confirms that our approach significantly enhances model calibration, reducing expected calibration error (ECE) by up to 35%, and improves selective prediction, even when accuracy gains are modest.
2604.08868.paper_summary_zh: 為了確保安全的臨床整合，深度學習模型必須提供的不僅僅是高準確度；它們還需要可靠的不確定性量化。雖然當前的醫療視覺Transformer表現良好，但它們經常在過度自信的預測和缺乏透明度方面遇到困難，這些問題因臨床數據的噪聲和不平衡性而加劇。為了解決這個問題，我們增強了修改後的醫療Transformer（MedFormer），該Transformer結合了基於原型的學習和不確定性引導的路由，通過利用Dirichlet分佈來獲取每個標記的證據不確定性，我們的框架可以實時量化和定位模糊性。這種不確定性不僅僅是一個輸出，而是訓練過程中的一個積極參與者，過濾掉不可靠的特徵更新。此外，使用類別特定的原型確保了嵌入空間保持結構化，允許基於視覺相似性做出決策。在四種模態（乳腺攝影、超聲波、MRI和組織病理學）上的測試證實，我們的方法顯著增強了模型的校準，將預期校準誤差（ECE）降低了多達35%，並改善了選擇性預測，即使在準確度增益較小的情況下。
2604.08868.author: Mohammed Maaz Sibhai et.al.
2604.08868.authors: Mohammed Maaz Sibhai, Abedalrhman Alkhateeb, Saad B. Ahmed
